title: Refactor with Confidence
description: Ask Claude to refactor a function while preserving behavior and adding tests.
copyContent:
Refactor the following function to improve readability and maintainability. Preserve all existing behavior. Add unit tests that verify the original behavior still works after refactoring.

```
[paste your function here]
```

Requirements:
- Keep the same function signature
- Extract complex conditions into named variables
- Add JSDoc comments
- Write at least 3 unit tests
usage: Paste this into Claude with your function code to get a clean refactor with test coverage.

title: Code Review Assistant
description: Get a thorough code review from Claude with actionable feedback.
copyContent:
Review the following code changes. For each issue found, provide:
1. Severity (blocker/suggestion/nit)
2. The specific line or section
3. What's wrong and why
4. A concrete fix

Focus on:
- Logic errors and edge cases
- Security vulnerabilities
- Performance implications
- Readability improvements

```diff
[paste your diff here]
```
usage: Paste your git diff to get a structured code review.

title: Generate Test Suite
description: Use Copilot to scaffold comprehensive test suites from existing code.
usage: Place this comment block above your code in VS Code and let Copilot generate tests.

title: Angular Component Scaffold
description: Copilot prompt for generating Angular 21 components with signals.
usage: Add this prompt in your editor and describe the component you need.

title: Debug with Context
description: Use Cursor's codebase awareness to diagnose bugs with full context.
copyContent:
I'm seeing this error:

```
[paste error message]
```

In this file: @[filename]

The expected behavior is: [describe what should happen]
The actual behavior is: [describe what's happening]

Please:
1. Identify the root cause by examining the relevant files
2. Explain why this error occurs
3. Provide a fix with the minimal changes needed
4. Suggest how to prevent this type of error in the future
usage: Use in Cursor chat with @ references to relevant files for context-aware debugging.

title: Migration Assistant
description: Migrate code patterns across your codebase using Cursor's multi-file editing.
usage: Use in Cursor Composer mode to migrate patterns across multiple files.

title: Test Coverage Analysis
description: Use Qodo to identify untested code paths and generate missing tests.
copyContent:
Analyze this code for test coverage gaps:

```typescript
[paste your code here]
```

For each uncovered path:
1. Describe the scenario not tested
2. Explain why it matters
3. Generate a test case
4. Rate the risk (high/medium/low) of not testing it
usage: Paste your service or component code to find what tests you're missing.

title: API Contract Validator
description: Validate API contracts and generate TypeScript interfaces from responses.
copyContent:
Given this API response:

```json
[paste API response]
```

Generate:
1. TypeScript interface with proper types (no `any`)
2. Zod validation schema
3. A factory function for test data
4. Example usage with error handling

Make all fields that could be null optional.
Use branded types for IDs.
usage: Paste an API response to get type-safe interfaces and validation.

title: Signal State Management
description: Convert RxJS-based state to Angular Signals with Claude's help.
copyContent:
Convert this RxJS-based state management to Angular Signals:

```typescript
[paste your service with BehaviorSubjects/Observables]
```

Rules:
- Replace BehaviorSubject with signal()
- Replace Observable.pipe() chains with computed()
- Replace subscribe() with effect()
- Keep the same public API surface
- Add readonly signals for public state
- Show before/after comparison
usage: Paste your RxJS-heavy service to get a clean signal-based version.

title: Accessibility Audit
description: Generate accessibility improvements for your HTML templates.
usage: Paste your template to get inline accessibility fixes.

title: Performance Optimizer
description: Identify and fix performance bottlenecks with Cursor's analysis.
copyContent:
Analyze this component for performance issues:

@[component-file]

Check for:
1. Unnecessary re-renders / change detection triggers
2. Missing OnPush or signal-based optimization
3. Large bundle imports that could be tree-shaken
4. Unoptimized loops or computations in templates
5. Missing trackBy in @for loops

For each issue, explain the impact and provide a fix.
usage: Reference your component file in Cursor to get performance analysis.

title: Security Review
description: Use Qodo to scan for common security vulnerabilities in your code.
copyContent:
Review this code for security vulnerabilities:

```typescript
[paste your code here]
```

Check for OWASP Top 10:
- XSS (innerHTML, template injection)
- Injection (SQL, command, template)
- Insecure data exposure
- Missing input validation
- Hardcoded secrets

For each finding:
- Severity: Critical/High/Medium/Low
- CWE ID if applicable
- Remediation with code fix
usage: Paste code for a security-focused review.
